title: Problem Brief: ProductOS next-version discover proof
claim: ProductOS cannot credibly claim the next version until the repo turns messy notes and transcripts into a same-day, decision-ready PRD package with minimal PM reconstruction.
source_snippet: ProductOS cannot credibly claim the next version until the repo turns messy notes and transcripts into a same-day, decision-ready PRD package with minimal PM reconstruction. The next version must prove a concrete disc...
implication: The next version must prove a concrete discover wedge inside the reference workspace before broader strategy claims are credible.
unknowns: What fresh market evidence shows this problem is urgent for the target PM buyer right now?
How do current alternatives frame this workflow problem and where are their proof boundaries weaker?
followup_questions: What fresh market evidence shows this problem is urgent for the target PM buyer right now?
